clusters.justification: Reflects the processing and regulation of emotional valences, arousal, and somatic states typically subserved by large-scale salience and limbic networks.
Captures the computation of incentive salience, reward outcomes, and goal-directed choices driven by striatal and ventromedial frontocortical circuitry.
Represents internally-directed cognitive processes that construct mental models of the self and others, primarily mapping onto the default mode network.
